set (gca,'PlotBoxAspectRatio',[1 1 1],'Xlim',[0,0.02],'Ylim',[0,0.02])
hold on
title('Malha(100X100) Dt(0.001 s) tempo(3.001 s)') 
hold on
ylabel('metros') 
hold on 
xlabel('metros')
